## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project code style and conventions
- [ ] Type hints added for all function signatures
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Test coverage meets threshold (>=80% for new code)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or hardcoded API keys
- [ ] No `print()` statements in production code
- [ ] No cross-layer imports (violation of LAW 1)
- [ ] No direct imports of `core.runtime.*` (violation of CORE FREEZE)
- [ ] Documentation updated if applicable
- [ ] `VERSION` file updated if applicable
- [ ] Architecture layer documented: <!-- specify which layer -->
